ethnicity_regional: The label reflects presentation and theme, not verified nationality, residence, or language; details such as spoken language come from what each performer states.
Regional and heritage labels describe presentation rather than verified background, so take specifics like language from each performer's own stated details.
Treat this as a presentation theme: it does not verify anyone's background or language, and performers state those details themselves.
interaction_style: The theme here is a style of session and interaction, so pay attention to how each listing describes its format and pace.
These listings are connected by a style of interaction, which makes each performer's own description of their sessions the most useful detail.
Since the theme concerns session style, the way each listing describes its format and interaction is the detail worth reading.
content_format: This theme is about format: whether you want something live or recorded shapes which listings fit, so note the timing that suits your visit.
Format is the organising idea here, so decide early whether live or recorded viewing suits this visit and read the listings with that in mind.
The listings here are grouped by format rather than by look, so the live-versus-recorded question matters more than usual.
age_style: The label points to an age range or style of presentation; adult performers interpret it in their own way, so expect a range rather than one look.
Age and style labels describe a broad presentation range, and each adult performer brings their own interpretation to it.
Expect a spread of styles within this age-and-presentation theme, since each performer interprets the label in their own way.
language_location: Language and region matter here, so take spoken languages from what performers state about themselves and confirm communication details on the destination page.
For a language or regional theme, each performer's own stated languages are the reliable detail; confirm them on the destination page when communication matters.
Treat stated languages as the key detail in this theme, and confirm anything that matters for communication on the performer's own platform page.
activity_fetish: This is a specific interest theme, so precision helps: match the exact variant you want against what each listing actually offers and what the platform permits.
Specific interests reward careful reading, so compare the exact variant you have in mind with what each listing states and what its platform permits.
With a niche interest theme, the useful work is matching your exact preference to what each listing states, within the destination platform's rules.
broad_discovery: This is a broad starting point rather than a narrow filter, so use the page to get a feel for the wide field and then refine toward what stands out.
Treat this page as a wide starting point: browse to see the range first, then narrow toward the listings that stand out.
The theme here is broad by design, which makes this page a place to survey the field before narrowing to a shortlist.
